TC-001.summary: Several required tool calls and key cancellation flow steps are missing, resulting in a failure to meet the pass criteria.

TC-002.summary: The bot fails to provide required immediate cancellation messaging, confirmation, and does not execute the cancellation as specified.

TC-003.summary: Most criteria are not met: the required cancellation message is missing, the pause offer is shown before cancellation, no cancellation tool is called, and confirmation is not requested.

TC-004.summary: The bot fails to handle sign-in detection, confirmation, and does not proceed with cancellation after sign-in is confirmed.

TC-005.summary: The bot failed to mention all subscription options, only referencing the selected one.

TC-006.summary: The transcript fails to meet the required criteria as the necessary tool call and routing to the specified agent did not occur.

TC-007.summary: The bot fails to inform the user that their subscription is currently paused, but correctly asks for confirmation and continues the cancellation flow after confirmation.

TC-008.summary: The bot failed to address most of the required criteria, only passing the one about not proceeding with cancellation for a Frozen/Expired subscription.

TC-009.summary: The bot failed to explain auto-renewal status and subscription end date, though it handled the reversal and closure correctly.

TC-010.summary: All criteria are fully satisfied; the bot routed immediately and only displayed the routing marker.

TC-011.summary: All criteria are clearly satisfied: the bot routes immediately without asking for a cancellation reason.

TC-012.summary: The bot failed to ask for a cancellation reason before routing and did not use the standard escalation message, resulting in an overall FAIL.

TC-013.summary: All criteria are fully satisfied; the bot correctly handles the cancellation flow as required.

TC-014.summary: The bot failed to handle the cancellation offer scenario and did not meet most of the required criteria.

TC-015.summary: The bot presented and offered the pause feature correctly, but failed to ask for the pause duration and did not confirm the required pause details after the user specified 2 months.

TC-016.summary: All criteria are fully satisfied; the bot handled the RallyTV cancellation flow correctly without offering a pause and provided the required cancellation impact details.

TC-017.summary: All criteria are fully satisfied; the bot handled the cancellation request and retraction correctly and politely.

TC-018.summary: Most critical pass criteria are not met, including tool call, exact phrasing, and routing to an agent.

TC-019.summary: All criteria are fully satisfied; the bot handled the cancellation and refund scenario correctly.

TC-020.summary: All criteria are satisfied: the bot handled the financial hardship case appropriately, offered a pause, and did not proceed directly to cancellation.
